text.title: testing-with-assistive-technology Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree from launch context + budget to tier-completion expectations. Each leaf references a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: all three tiers active before launch
CI on every PR + quarterly AT-user + per-release manual
downgrade compliance claim or recruit AT user

text.example: context=pre-launch-public → all three tiers active → bug-report fields enforced → config valid.
